text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen. After their heated
battle last year, all eyes are on Hishi Amazon and
Narita Brian for their big rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon is all fired up for her fated
one-on-one. Sparks fly as they rev up for the
race, and now, the decisive battle is about to
begin!
